metadata.short_desc: Bilibili video parsing, dynamic/live subscription, bangumi recommendations
metadata.desc: Bilibili dynamic push, video info parsing, live room status notifications, QQ mini-app parsing, and LLM-based Bangumi anime recommendations.

sessdata.hint: Bilibili SESSDATA cookie for fetching dynamics and video info. See README for retrieval instructions.

proxy.hint: Proxy address for Bilibili API requests. Example: http://127.0.0.1:7890 or socks5://127.0.0.1:1080. Leave blank for direct connection.

bangumi_token.hint: Optional. Bangumi (bgm.tv) access token. Required for authorized API endpoints.

interval_secs.hint: Detection interval per uploader in seconds. Default: 300s (5 minutes).

task_gap_secs.hint: Minimum interval between two consecutive uploader tasks in seconds, used to control API request rate.

reconnect_silent.hint: When enabled, if a long time has passed since the last successful push on startup, the plugin will stay silent for a period to digest the backlog.

rai.hint: When enabled, dynamic and live notifications are rendered as HTML card images for better visual effect. Disable to use plain text mode.

renderer_template.hint: Select the rendering style for dynamic/live push cards.

node.hint: When enabled, dynamics are sent as forward messages (nodes), suitable for platforms like QQ that support forwarded messages.

enable_parse_miniapp.hint: When enabled, automatically parse Bilibili QQ mini-app cards in messages and extract direct links.

enable_parse_BV.hint: When enabled, automatically detect BV numbers and b23.tv short links in messages and reply with video detail cards.

dynamic_limit.hint: Maximum number of dynamics pushed per uploader per polling cycle, to avoid flooding.

recent_dynamic_cache.hint: Size of the recent_ids deduplication cache. Larger values increase dedup range but use more memory.

plain_push_template.hint: Message template for non-image push mode. Leave blank to use the default format. Available variables: {name} (uploader name), {uid} (UID), {action} (action text), {title} (title), {text} (body), {url} (link).

plain_push_forward_template.hint: Forward content template for non-image push mode. Leave blank to use the default format. Available variables: {name}, {uid}, {title}, {text}, {url} (sourced from the forwarded original dynamic).

enable_ai_summary.hint: When enabled, an AI (LLM) summary is generated after each dynamic push. Requires a valid AI model configured.

ai_summary_prompt.hint: Optional. Custom prompt template for AI summaries. Use {content} to represent the assembled dynamic content. Leave blank to use the built-in default prompt.
